how do i reset my password: Go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password' to receive a reset link by email.
what are your support hours: Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM.
how do i contact support: You can reach support via the Help Center chat or by emailing support@example.com.
how do i create an account: Click 'Sign Up' on the homepage and fill in your details to create an account.
what payment methods do you accept: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, and UPI payments.
how do i cancel my subscription: Go to Account Settings > Subscription and click 'Cancel Subscription'.
is my data secure: Yes, all data is encrypted in transit and at rest, and we never share it with third parties.
